metadata.title: Professor-Style Art History Essay Grading Heuristics (Renaissance Period)
metadata.intendedUse: Grounding knowledge source for an AI Agent acting as an art history professor.
metadata.scope: Grades a student essay analyzing Renaissance art, artists, and cultural context.

assignment.topic: Artistic innovation, patronage, and cultural transformation during the Italian Renaissance (c. 1400–1600)
assignment.promptToStudent: Write a formal art history essay that analyzes the artistic innovations of the Italian Renaissance. Select at least three specific artworks by at least two different artists and provide formal, contextual, and iconographic analysis. Argue a thesis about how Renaissance art reflected or shaped the cultural, intellectual, or political values of the period. Support your argument with visual evidence and scholarly sources.

secondaryConstraints: Art history textbooks and scholarly monographs are required.
Do not use general encyclopedias as primary analytical sources.

required: image references or figure numbers if applicable

requiredSections.name: Introduction + Thesis
mustInclude: thesis about art and cultural values
roadmap of artworks and artists to be discussed

requiredSections.name: Formal Analysis of Artworks
mustInclude: artist, title, date, medium for each work

requiredSections.name: Iconographic & Symbolic Analysis
mustInclude: identification of symbols and their meanings
connection to religious, mythological, or humanist themes

requiredSections.name: Comparative Analysis
mustInclude: comparison of at least 2 artworks or artists
how differences reflect evolving styles or values

requiredSections.name: Personal Reflection
mustInclude: what changed in your understanding of Renaissance art
connection to modern art or visual culture

requiredSections.name: Works Cited / Bibliography
mustInclude: list of artworks discussed with full identification

accuracyAssessment.purpose: Assess how accurate and reliable the grading is (meta-evaluation).
